## Findings

- **PRD-BL-001 (P2, fixed):** adding the dated execution log made `knowledge-graph.json/html` stale. Regenerated graph and re-ran `pnpm docs:check-graph`.
- **PRD-BL-002 (P1, fixed):** cold Playwright smoke bootstrap did not build `@sergeant/db-schema` and did not wait for API `/health`; auth setup could hit `/api/auth/sign-up/email` while `:3000` was unavailable. Fixed `apps/web/tests/smoke/start-smoke-webserver.mjs` to build `@sergeant/db-schema` and wait for API readiness before web preview.
- **PRD-BL-003 (P2, fixed):** post-fix critical smoke could exceed the 240s Playwright `webServer.timeout` during a cold Vite build on this Windows laptop even though tests had not failed. Raised the smoke web-server timeout to 360s and retested the full critical smoke pack.
- **PRD-A-001 (P2, fixed):** chat quota tests still asserted the old Free AI cap of `5/day`; canonical ADR-0068, UI copy, and code use `15/day`. Updated stale expectations and retested focused chat suite.
- **PRD-A-002 (P1, open external):** real provider latency/load profile (`10 -> 25 -> 50`, p50/p95/p99 first token) cannot be completed in this local checkout because no real Anthropic/staging key is available. Controlled-degradation 503 and browser no-hang behavior are covered locally.
- **PRD-C-001 (P1, fixed):** dependency audit found moderate vulnerable transitive ranges in `qs`, `brace-expansion`, `dompurify`, and `js-yaml`. Added targeted pnpm selector overrides, updated the lockfile, and validated the override guard.
- **PRD-C-002 (P1, open external):** `@opentelemetry/core <2.8.0` remains through `@sentry/node@8.55.2`. The audit requires `>=2.8.0`, but the registry reported latest `@opentelemetry/core@2.7.1` during this run; fixing this likely requires a coordinated Sentry/OTel SDK upgrade rather than a safe patch override.
- **PRD-C-003 (P2, fixed):** `routes/internal.test.ts` auth-guard tests could time out on Windows cold internal-router imports before assertions ran. Added scoped 45s timeouts to the two cold auth-guard tests and retested the focused security pack.
- **PRD-C-004 (P2, fixed):** `scripts/check-pnpm-overrides.mjs` used `execFileSync("pnpm")`, which fails under Node on Windows; direct `pnpm.cmd` also failed without a shell. Added `shell: true` on Windows and retested `pnpm lint:pnpm-overrides`.
- **PRD-C-005 (P2, open external):** `pnpm lint:secrets` exited 0 locally but skipped the real `gitleaks` binary because it is not installed in this worktree environment. Treat CI secret scanning as the authoritative proof unless `gitleaks` is installed locally.
- **PRD-D-001 (P2, fixed):** `routes/internal/alerts.test.ts` post-route tests timed out on Windows cold alert/openclaw imports before assertions ran. Added scoped 60s timeouts to the cold alert post tests and retested the full observability pack.
- **PRD-D-002 (P1, open external):** real alert delivery to the agreed channel and dashboard/Sentry screenshot cannot be proven locally without staging/prod secrets and external dashboard access. Local route/store/shipper/n8n validation passed, but staging incident drill remains required.

## Open Questions / External Inputs

- Production/staging secrets and external dashboards are not printed in this log. If a scenario requires them, record only redacted target names and artifact references.
